_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of talent management practices for data and AI organizations, including workforce planning methodologies, skills gap analysis, hiring strategy, retention approaches, career path development, and succession planning.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI LS domain. Knowledge LS-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-006 (LS, cosine: 0.444), LS-K-004 (LS, cosine: 0.416).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.536). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, workforce]. NICE-only terms [trends] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, analysis, approaches, career, data, development] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.922, R=0.848). P exceeds R by 0.074 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Knowledge of workforce trends" and "Knowledge of talent management practices for data and AI organizations, includin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.531 ≈ STS 0.536 (gap 0.005). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, workforce] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, workforce]. NICE-only: [trends]. WIDAI-only: [ai, analysis, approaches, career, data, development].
